title: Endrendrum Kadhal
subTitle: Vijay falls in love with Meenu during a business trip and decides to marry her. However, problems arise when Meenu's brother asks him to leave India and settle in Switzerland with her family.

title: Agathiyar
subTitle: Agathiyar Muni, an avatar of Lord Brahma and a member of the seven sages, performs supernatural feats of strength and daring in order to serve his people and the gods.

title: Deivam
subTitle: An anthology of four stories that shed light on the miracles and marvels performed by Lord Murugan for his ardent devotees.

title: Bhakthi Neram
subTitle: Bhakthi Neram

title: Chinna Thambi
subTitle: After an astrologer predicts that their sister will marry a man of her own choosing, three protective brothers go to dire lengths to prevent the prophecy from being fulfilled.

title: Pithamagan
subTitle: Chithan, who has grown up in a cemetery, gets imprisoned during a drug raid. In prison, he meets Sakthi, a conman, who changes his life forever.

title: Sivappu Sooriyan
subTitle: Vijay, a merchant navy officer, returns home to meet his sister, Selvi, and her husband, Vishwanthan. However, he finds out that they are missing and sets out to search for them.

title: Sigappu Rojakkal
subTitle: A young man, traumatised by his past, grows up to despise the opposite sex and exploits them. However, things take a turn when he falls in love with a woman prisoner while in jail.

title: Suyamvaram
subTitle: Kuselan, a wealthy man with nine children, wishes to see them all married before he passes away. As a result, he offers a large dowry and organises detailed interviews with the chosen suitors.

title: Maaran
subTitle: Mathimaaaran, an honest journalist, exposes a fraud by Pazhani, a politician. As a result, it lands his career in trouble, while also threatening his family's safety.

title: Vaanmathi
subTitle: Krishna, a young man, comes from a middle-class family but falls in love with a rich girl. Things take a turn when the girl's father opposes their union.

title: Vaanmathi
subTitle: Krishna, a young man, comes from a middle-class family but falls in love with a rich girl. Things take a turn when the girl's father opposes their union.

title: Student No. 1
subTitle: To fulfil his father's dreams, Aditya joins a law college, although his heart yearns to be an engineer. He tries to rehabilitate unruly students, while hiding his dark past.

title: ABCD
subTitle: Avi and Bhasha are two brothers who enjoy a lavish lifestyle and are later tricked by the former's father into living a life in poverty.

title: Bhakthi Neram
subTitle: Bhakthi Neram

title: Thavasi
subTitle: Thavasi is a revered landlord who lives in a small village. However, his life changes drastically when a young man commits suicide due to a misjudgement he makes.

title: Surieyan
subTitle: Surieyan, an IPS officer, is accused of killing a politician. However, he goes into hiding and eventually strives to prove his innocence.

title: Thamizhan
subTitle: Surya is an honest lawyer who firmly believes in the legal system. In his fight for justice, he loses his sister and brother-in-law but continues nevertheless.

title: Pokkiri Raja
subTitle: Sanjeevi loses his job and his girlfriend leaves him due to his massive yawns. Later, he goes to a doctor to get himself cured and learns that he has inherited a superpower from his great grandfather.

title: Senthoora Poove
subTitle: Ashok, a city dweller, comes to a village and falls in love with Ponni, a widow, who has a torturous step-mother. Later, the couple overcomes many obstacles to be united in love.

title: Pudhu Pudhu Arthangal
subTitle: Bharti, a highly successful singer, escapes from his jealous wife who is unable to deal with his female fans. He later meets Jyothi, a dancer who has also escaped from her cruel husband.

title: Lovely
subTitle: Mahadevan does not believe in love and hates the word, but his daughter Nivedha loves Chandru. In order to get his consent, the couple comes up with an intricate plan and executes it.

title: Lovely
subTitle: Mahadevan does not believe in love and hates the word, but his daughter Nivedha loves Chandru. In order to get his consent, the couple comes up with an intricate plan and executes it.

title: Mannan
subTitle: Krishnan's boss, Shanti, is an autocratic, domineering woman whom he constantly defies. Irked and revengeful, she manipulates his mother who has paralysis and marries him in a bid to control him.

title: Mahanadhi
subTitle: An honest man, Krishnaswamy, is deceived by a chit fund scam and wrongfully imprisoned. Subsequently, as his family falls apart, he endures immense hardships in jail.

title: Bhakthi Neram
subTitle: Bhakthi Neram

title: Indru Poi Naalai Vaa
subTitle: Three friends fall in love with the same woman who moves into the house next door. They try to impress her individually in hilarious ways and leave the decision up to her.

title: Ejamaan
subTitle: Vaanavaryan, the much-loved leader of a village, invites his rival Vallavarayan's wrath when he marries Vaitheeswari, the woman he loves. To take revenge, Vallavarayan resorts to drastic measures.

title: Minsara Kanna
subTitle: Indira hates men and only employs women in her company and personal staff. Kasi enters her life as a driver and soon, one by one, his entire family starts working in the same household.

title: Sathya
subTitle: Sathya, a successful gambler, meets Rosy at a dance bar and sets out on an adventure with her. However, they face several obstacles when a gang of thugs is on the lookout for Rosy.

title: Thambikku Entha Ooru
subTitle: Seeing Balu's spendthrift and carefree attitude, his father sends him to his friend's house in a village to get reformed. Things get complicated when he gets entangled in a love triangle.

title: Thenali
subTitle: Thenali suffers from panophobia and seeks doctor Kailash's help but the latter denies his request. Later, when Kailash goes on a vacation with his family, Thenali joins them and charms his sister.

title: Majaa
subTitle: Aadhi and Mathi, along with their father, go to a village and help a retired officer pay off his debts to a landlord. Soon, Mathi forcibly marries the landlord's daughter to teach him a lesson.
